tools.name: analyze_trace
tools.description: Full diagnostic: loop detection, cost breakdown, stuck-state classification, and fix recommendations for an AI agent trace.

tools.name: detect_loops
tools.description: Detect exact-call repeats, periodic tool-call cycles, and ping-pong patterns in an agent trace.

tools.name: breakdown_cost
tools.description: Calculate per-model token usage and USD cost from an agent trace. Supports custom pricing overrides.
